tests.name: whitespace_only
tests.description: Only whitespace should be treated as empty pipeline

tests.name: trailing_pipe_tolerated
tests.description: Trailing pipe is tolerated by both implementations

tests.name: double_pipe
tests.description: Double pipe should produce an error

tests.name: leading_whitespace_then_pipe
tests.description: Whitespace before pipe, non-generating first command

tests.name: single_index_query
tests.description: Simplest valid query: just an index filter

tests.name: unclosed_single_quote
tests.description: Unclosed single-quoted string literal

tests.name: escaped_quotes_in_string
tests.description: Escaped double quotes inside a string

tests.name: many_pipes
tests.description: Long pipeline with many chained commands
tests.spl: index=web | stats count BY host | sort -count | head 10 | eval label="top" | table host, count, label

tests.name: stats_by_null_semantic
tests.description: stats BY should warn about null exclusion with advice=all

tests.name: dedup_without_sort
tests.description: dedup without preceding sort should warn BEST001

tests.name: join_without_type
tests.description: join without explicit type= warns BEST002 and BEST010

tests.name: transaction_warns_best003
tests.description: transaction always warns BEST003 (bounds not parsed into options)

tests.name: sort_then_head_unlimited
tests.description: sort followed by head without sort limit warns BEST005

tests.name: sort_unlimited_no_head
tests.description: sort without limit and no following head warns BEST006
tests.spl: index=web | stats count BY host | sort - count

tests.name: table_star
tests.description: table * warns about performance BEST007

tests.name: consecutive_eval
tests.description: Two consecutive eval commands should warn BEST008

tests.name: extraction_before_filter
tests.description: rex before where warns BEST009

tests.name: mvexpand_warns
tests.description: mvexpand warns BEST013 about event multiplication

tests.name: spath_warns
tests.description: spath warns BEST014 about expensive parsing

tests.name: limit_tail
tests.description: tail command triggers LIMTAI limit warning

tests.name: limit_join_subsearch
tests.description: join triggers LIMJOI limit warning

tests.name: where_semantic
tests.description: where triggers SEM-WHE semantic warning

tests.name: head_filters_sem
tests.description: head triggers SEM-FLT semantic warning

tests.name: map_empty_search
tests.description: map with empty search argument is valid

tests.name: subsearch_empty_bracket
tests.description: Empty subsearch in join should error

tests.name: valid_json_output
tests.description: Valid SPL produces serializable JSON

tests.name: invalid_json_output
tests.description: Invalid SPL still produces serializable JSON
